description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Automated Test Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: build-windows, build-linux, and build-macos. The build-windows job should run on a Windows environment with a matrix strategy for different Windows versions and audio libraries, downloading and extracting various dependencies, generating a Visual Studio solution with premake, and building the solution with MSBuild. The build-linux and build-macos jobs should run on Linux and macOS environments, respectively, with a matrix strategy for different OS versions, downloading and extracting dependencies, generating makefiles with premake, and building the project with make.
